problem id: c90fa3a6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND SHR(2)) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00010011 -> 00000100
  10001100 -> 00000001
  10111001 -> 00100011
  10001001 -> 00000011
  10000000 -> 00000001
  00000110 -> 00000000
  00111111 -> 00001110
  10011101 -> 00100011
  10100100 -> 00001001
  10000111 -> 00000001

query: 01011011
predicted answer: 00010110
